tool_args.label: M79 Select Bus Service - Manhattan Community Board 7

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: SBS implementation on M79 crosstown bus corridor, including dedicated bus lanes, off-board fare collection, signal priority, and pedestrian safety improvements.
M79 crosstown bus route between West 79th Street on the Upper West Side and East 79th/86th Streets on the Upper East Side, connecting 1, 6, B, C subway lines and 16 bus routes.

payload.limits: West 79th Street at Broadway to East 79th/86th Streets at York Avenue and East End Avenue
payload.description: M79 crosstown bus corridor running approximately 2 miles across Manhattan, serving the Upper West Side and Upper East Side.

tool_args.label: W 79 St & Broadway: dedicated left turn bay and protected phase

payload.description: Ban southbound left turn on W 79 St at Broadway, add dedicated left turn bay and protected phase (green arrow) for northbound Broadway, move bus layover space to last stop and restore parking.

tool_args.label: W 79 St & Riverside: move bus layover

payload.description: Move bus layover space behind existing stop at W 79 St and Riverside Dr.

tool_args.label: W 79 St & Columbus Ave: signal and turn improvements

payload.description: Add right turn bay and protected turn phase, add protected left turn phase, change signal timing to have protected turn phases and separate all-way pedestrian phase, add No Standing Anytime to clear corner for bus and other right turns.

tool_args.label: W 81 St & Columbus Ave: street reconfiguration

payload.description: Widen travel lanes to relieve congestion and improve visibility, add No Parking 9a-5p M-F for standing deliveries, add No Standing Anytime for length of turn bay, separate SBS/Local stop space, add EB curbside bus lane between Columbus Ave and CPW (7a-7p M-F, parking all other times).

tool_args.label: W 81 St & CPW: bus lane and layover

payload.location_text: W 81 St and Central Park West
payload.description: Continue EB curbside bus lane to CPW (7a-7p M-F, parking all other times), add No Parking 9a-5p M-F for standing deliveries/pickups/dropoffs, add bus layover 9a-2p M-F on CPW with parking all other times.

normalized_location.raw_text: W 81 St and Central Park West

tool_args.label: Finalize street designs and begin SBS bus stop construction

payload.description: Finalize street designs, continue SBS bus stop construction including fare machines, wayfinding, and real time passenger info.
Begin roadway and signage work for M79 SBS.
Complete project implementation and launch M79 SBS service.

payload.claim_text: SBS has brought: 10-30% faster bus speeds, about 10% increase in ridership, more reliable service, customer satisfaction of 95%, safer streets / reduction in crashes.

tool_args.label: M79 crucial connection to subways and bus routes

payload.claim_text: Crucial connection to 1 6 B C trains; connection to 16 bus routes including M15 SBS.
payload.subject: M79 bus route

warnings: claim.routes is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route arrays should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: Over 50% of trip spent delayed, crawling, or at bus stop. Bus is moving well only 43% of the trip. Customers wait in long lines to pay on board.
payload.subject: M79 bus route

payload.claim_text: Multiagency effort to reduce traffic fatalities. Five intersections: 79th St and Broadway, 79th St and Lexington Ave, 79th St and 3rd Ave, 79th St and 2nd Ave, 79th St and 1st Ave.
payload.subject: 79th Street corridor

tool_args.label: M79 carries over 18,000 passengers per day
